word_list.word: a thief knows a thief, as a wolf knows a wolf
word_list.pronunciation: ɐ θˈiːf nˈoʊz ɐ θˈiːf æz ɐ wˈʊlf nˈoʊz ɐ wˈʊlf

senses.definition: used to imply that people who have experience in criminal activities have a certain level of understanding and familiarity with the behavior and tactics of other criminals

word_list.word: East is East, (and|) West is West
word_list.pronunciation: ˈiːst ɪz ˈiːst ænd wˈɛst ɪz wˈɛst

senses.definition: used to suggest that there are certain inherent differences between two things or groups of people that cannot be overcome or reconciled

word_list.word: all cats are gray in the dark
word_list.pronunciation: ˈɔːl kˈæts ɑːɹ ɡɹˈeɪ ɪnðə dˈɑːɹk

senses.definition: used to suggest that when we lack knowledge or understanding about a particular subject, it can be hard to discern the differences between similar things or people

examples.x: Without enough information or context, it can be difficult to distinguish between different options - all cats are gray in the dark, and it's important to gather enough information to make an informed decision.

senses.definition: used to imply that daughters often share similar qualities, traits, or behaviors with their mothers, either as a result of genetics, upbringing, or cultural influence

word_list.word: all that glitters is not gold
word_list.pronunciation: ˈɔːl ðæt ɡlˈɪɾɚz ɪz nˌɑːt ɡˈoʊld

senses.definition: used to suggest that appearances can be deceiving, and that it is important to look beyond surface-level qualities to assess true value or worth

examples.x: Many people are drawn to the glitz and glamour of Hollywood, but all that glitters is not gold, and the constant pressure and scrutiny can take a toll on mental health and well-being.

word_list.word: every light is not the sun
word_list.pronunciation: ˈɛvɹi lˈaɪt ɪz nˌɑːt ðə sˈʌn

senses.definition: used to highlight the notion that things or people may appear similar but they may not possess the same qualities
used to say that a son's behavior or qualities are similar to those of his father
